Performing Laboratory Comment

Renal function has declined since the prior draw: creatinine 1.06 → 1.44 mg/dL with eGFR 78 → 54 mL/min/1.73m² (now CKD stage G3a range), accompanied by potassium 5.4 mmol/L and BUN 27 mg/dL. Pattern is consistent with a pre-renal / NSAID-related effect; correlate with medications and consider repeat renal panel. Peripheral eosinophilia (9%, absolute 0.71 10³/µL) noted — correlate clinically with atopic/allergic history. Results reviewed and released by the performing laboratory.

Flag key: H = above reference range  ·  L = below reference range. Reference ranges are method- and instrument-specific. Prior values shown for the same analyte from the most recent available prior specimen (2026-01-06).
